description: Project brain — persistent knowledge synced with Local Brain vault

files.OBJECTIVES.md: Project goals, scope, non-goals. Read at session start.
files.DESIGN.md: Original application intent, UX, and durable product workflows. Keep separate from live technical architecture.
files.ARCHITECTURE.md: Stack decisions, key modules. Update when architecture changes.
files.DECISIONS.md: ADR log. Append new decisions, never delete.
files.CONTEXT.md: Current state snapshot. Update at session end.
